event_id.description: Globally unique event id (UUID v4 recommended)

type.description: Event type, e.g. user_message, assistant_message, tool_call, tool_result, system_event

display_name.description: Human-readable name for logging and UI

source.description: Where this event came from (channel/adapter that produced it)

adapter.description: Adapter/bridge that ingested the event, e.g. 'n8n', 'fastapi', 'webhook'

thread_id.description: Thread/topic id within the conversation (if applicable)

message_id.description: Platform-native message id for inbound events

external_actor_id.description: Platform-native user id of the originating human (if different from actor.id)

destination.description: Where this event is going (the channel that should deliver it)

stream_id.description: Conversation stream this event belongs to. Format: '<platform>:<account_id>:<conversation_id>:<thread_id>'. Required for any event that participates in a turn — used by recent_message_events to scope context per-channel and prevent cross-channel leakage.

turn_id.description: Identifier of the turn this event belongs to. User and assistant events in the same turn share a turn_id.
